scripts.build: bun -e 'import { createSolidTransformPlugin } from "@opentui/solid/bun-plugin"; const result = await Bun.build({ entrypoints: ["src/tui.tsx"], outdir: "dist", target: "bun", format: "esm", external: ["@opencode-ai/*", "solid-js", "solid-js/*", "@opentui/*"], plugins: [createSolidTransformPlugin()] }); if (!result.success) { console.error(result.logs); process.exit(1); }'
